features.name: variadic multi-operand AND chain in continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a continuous assign statement where five or more bit-select operands from a packed input vector are chained together with bitwise AND, forming a variadic AND expression that stress-tests the LowerVariadic synthesis pass

features.name: shared AND sub-expression between two outputs where one is a strict operand subset
features.description: Code should include two continuous assign statements where the AND operands of one output are a strict subset of the AND operands of another output, forming a common sub-expression that a synthesis pass should reuse rather than duplicate

features.name: bit-select from packed input vector in combinational logic
features.description: Code should include combinational logic that individually selects multiple bits from a packed input vector using bit-select expressions and combines them with bitwise operators in continuous assignments
